films.title: Sunset Boulevard
films.synopsis: A screenwriter develops a dangerous relationship with a faded film star.

films.title: The Third Man
films.synopsis: A pulp fiction novelist travels to postwar Vienna and investigates the death of an old friend.

films.title: Seven Samurai
films.synopsis: A poor village under attack by bandits recruits seven unemployed samurai to help them defend themselves.

films.title: Casablanca
films.synopsis: A cynical expatriate American cafe owner struggles to decide whether or not to help his former lover and her fugitive husband escape.

films.title: Metropolis
films.synopsis: In a futuristic city sharply divided between the working class and the city planners, the son of the city's mastermind falls in love with a working-class prophet.

films.title: Double Indemnity
films.synopsis: An insurance representative lets himself be talked into a murder insurance fraud.

films.title: The Maltese Falcon
films.synopsis: A private detective takes on a case that involves him with three eccentric criminals.
